pages.raw_text:
Since the granting of an organizers
commission to II. S. Heskett last May
the following unions have affiliated
with the American Federation of La
Dor. either directly or through their
national organizations: Broom maxi
ers, upholsterers, Diapers, carpet
layers. Mattresses alliance, Bartend-
ers' League of America, Shinglers'
Protective union, shirt waist and
laundry workers. leather workers on
horse goods, sign writer's, boiler
makers and ship builders (resusci-
tated), bridge men and structural
iron workers independent NationaD.
The cooks and kitchen helpers have
withdrawn from the walters. and both
have now strong local organizations
under the Hotel and Restaurant EN-
ployes International alliance.


Nearly all these unions" says Mr..
Heskett, have fair hours and good
wages and no strikes have been nee
essary with any of them"
